subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath hearkened to Thy call, responded to Thy summons, turned his face towards Thee, and voiced Thy praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبدک الذی سمع ندائک و لبی لخطابک و توجه الیک و نطق بالثناء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
